headline: James Trafford — update
body: 🚨 EXCL: Newcastle United rekindle interest in signing James Trafford from Manchester City. No formal talks yet & complicated by #MCFC goalkeeper wanting to decide future post-WC (may be too late for #NUFC) but desire firm + clubs in con
text: 🚨 EXCL: Newcastle United rekindle interest in signing James Trafford from Manchester City. No formal talks yet & complicated by #MCFC goalkeeper wanting to decide future post-WC (may be too late for #NUFC) but desire firm + clubs in contact @TheAthleticFC https://t.co/U3MXMwXq4q
